themeAndAppearance.label: Theme and appearance

themeSelect.label: Theme
description: If you're interested in creating your own custom theme, check out the

gradientToggle.description: Some themes optionally support gradients for a more dynamic look

fontSelect.description: Customize the font used in the application

thumbnailRatioSelect.description: The aspect ratio to use for thumbnails

thumbnailPlaceholder.description: The style to use for thumbnail placeholders

primaryNavigation.label: Primary navigation
primaryNavigation.description: Choose between a minimal sidebar or a topbar navigation
primaryNavigation.disclaimer: * Settings for the unselected option will be disabled or hidden

doubleSidebar.label: Settings sidebar
doubleSidebar.description: Enables the sidebar navigation for the settings pages. If you frequently use a smaller screen, you may want to disable this.

replacePrimarySidebar.label: Replace primary sidebar
replacePrimarySidebar.description: Any instance of a secondary sidebar will replace the primary sidebar instead of being displayed next to it

tooltips.doubleSidebar: This setting requires the settings sidebar to be enabled
tooltips.topbar: This setting is not currently supported when the primary navigation is set to top bar

description.sidebar: Arrange and customize the navigation items in the sidebar
description.topbar: Arrange and customize the navigation items in the topbar

createAction.label: Show create action

linkToAll.help: A link to a page dedicated to viewing all items of this type

displaySpacing.label: Display spacing
displaySpacing.description: Adjusts the overall spacing between elements throughout the app
displaySpacing.disclaimer: * Compact display mode is not implemented yet

maxWidthPreference.label: Adjusted width
maxWidthPreference.description: Stump applies a max-width to the viewport. This setting allows you to adjust or remove this limit
maxWidthPreference.tooltip: This setting is not currently supported when the primary navigation is set to sidebar

additionalPreferences.label: Additional preferences
additionalPreferences.description: Customize the appearance and behavior of Stump with these additional settings

showThumbnailsInHeader.description: If you prefer to see thumbnails more often, this setting will show them in more places

tooltips.enabled: This setting will show thumbnails in more places
tooltips.disabled: This setting will not show thumbnails in more places

hideScrollbarToggle.label: Hide scrollbar
hideScrollbarToggle.description: Some pages simply look better without a scrollbar, this setting will hide it when possible

tooltips.enabled: This setting will hide the scrollbar on some pages
tooltips.disabled: This setting will show the scrollbar on some pages

enableAlphabetFiltering.label: Alphabet filtering
enableAlphabetFiltering.description: Show an alphabet filter when applicable

enableFancyAnimations.label: Fancy animations
enableFancyAnimations.description: A broad opt-in for fancier animations throughout the app

queryIndicatorToggle.label: Background fetch indicator
queryIndicatorToggle.description: Show a loading indicator whenever a query is running in the background

liveRefetchToggle.label: Live refetch
liveRefetchToggle.description: Refetch queries on the fly to hydrate the UI with new data as it comes in. This can be resource intensive

enableJobOverlayToggle.label: Job overlay
enableJobOverlayToggle.description: Show a floating overlay while a job is running

subtitle: Select the permissions you want to grant to this user. For more information on what each permission does, see the

explorer.label: Esplora file
explorer.description: Consente all'utente di accedere ai vari esplora file. La restrizione dei contenuti non può essere garantita quando questa funzione viene abilitata

download.label: Download files

upload.label: Upload files
upload.description: Consente all'utente di caricare file sul server

read.label: Access emailers

create.description: Allows the user to create new emailers

manage.description: Allows the user to manage existing emailers

create.label: Creare librerie
create.description:
Consente all'utente di creare nuove librerie.
Include le autorizzazioni per modificare ed eseguire la scansione

scan.label: Scansionare librerie
scan.description: Consente all'utente di avviare scansioni per le librerie esistenti

edit.label: Modificare librerie
edit.description: Consente all'utente di modificare i dettagli di base per le librerie esistenti

manage.label: Gestire librerie
manage.description:
Consente all'utente di gestire le impostazioni avanzate per le librerie esistenti.
Include le autorizzazioni per modificare ed eseguire la scansione

delete.label: Eliminare librerie
delete.description:
Consente all'utente di eliminare le librerie esistenti.
Include le autorizzazioni per modificare, gestire ed eseguire scansioni

manage.label: Gestire server
manage.description:
Consente all'utente di gestire il server.
Include *molte* altre autorizzazioni

read.label: Leggere utenti
read.description: Consente all'utente d'interrogare altri utenti sul server. Richiesto per altre funzionalità, ad esempio escludere gli utenti dall'accesso a una libreria

manage.label: Gestire utenti
manage.description:
Consente all'utente di gestire altri utenti sul server.
Include i permessi per leggere, creare e aggiornare

read.label: Access smart list feature
read.description: Consente all'utente di accedere alle funzionalità delle smart list. Le autorizzazioni granulari non sono ancora implementate, quindi questa include i permessi per leggere, creare e aggiornare le proprie liste

validation.ageRestrictionTooLow: La limitazione dell'età non può essere inferiore a 0

deleteConfirmation.title: Delete activity
deleteConfirmation.description: All records of login activity will be permanently deleted from the database

server/email.title: Email
server/email.description: Settings related to configuring an SMTP emailer for your Stump server instance

emailers.title: SMTP emailers
emailers.description: The clients you have configured for sending emails from your Stump server instance
emailers.singleInstanceDisclaimer: While Stump supports multiple SMTP configurations in the backend, only one can be configured on the UI. This will be improved in the future

sendHistory.heading: Send history
sendHistory.description: A record of emails sent from this emailer
sendHistory.emptySubtitle: The history of this emailer is empty. It has either not been used or the history has been cleared

devices.title: Email devices
devices.description: The device aliases you have configured for receiving emails from your Stump server instance

name.label: Nome
name.description: A friendly name to uniquely identify this device alias

email.label: Email
email.description: The email address this alias will be associated with

forbidden.label: Vietato
forbidden.description: When enabled, no user may send emails to the address associated with this alias

table.emptySubtitle: Create a new device alias for future use

name.label: Nome
name.description: A friendly name to uniquely identify this emailer

smtpSettings.heading: SMTP settings
smtpSettings.description: The SMTP-specific settings for this emailer

smtpProvider.label: SMTP provider preset
smtpProvider.description: The provider of the SMTP server. This is used to prefill some common settings, but doesn't capture all providers

smtpHost.label: SMTP host
smtpHost.description: The hostname of the SMTP server

smtpPort.label: SMTP port
smtpPort.description: The port of the SMTP server

tlsEnabled.label: TLS enabled
tlsEnabled.description: If enabled, the connection to the SMTP server will be encrypted

username.label: Nome utente
username.description: Il nome utente per l'autenticazione con il server SMTP. Tipicamente è l'indirizzo email

password.label: Password
password.description: The password for authenticating with the SMTP server. If you're using Gmail, you may need to generate an app-specific password

senderSettings.heading: Sender settings
senderSettings.description: The settings for the sender of the email

senderDisplayName.label: Nome visualizzato del mittente
senderDisplayName.description: The name that will be displayed to recipients

senderEmail.label: Sender email address
senderEmail.description: The email address that will be displayed to recipients

maxAttachmentSize.label: Max attachment size
maxAttachmentSize.description: The maximum size, in bytes, that an attachment can be

testEmailer.recipientDescription: An email address to send the test email to

error.title: Failed to send test email
error.description: Check your SMTP settings and try again

createEmailer.title: Create emailer
createEmailer.description: Create a new SMTP emailer for your Stump server instance

updateEmailer.title: Update emailer
updateEmailer.description: Update the details of this SMTP emailer

server/tags.title: Tags
server/tags.description: Create and manage tags for organizing your content

table.title: Tags
table.description: All tags available on this server

empty.title: No tags
empty.action: Create your first tag to get started

modal.heading: Create new tag
modal.description: Tags can be assigned to books, series, and libraries

modal.heading: Rename tag
modal.description: Change the name of this tag across all assigned items

deleteTag.title: Delete tag
deleteTag.description: This tag will be removed from all books, series, and libraries. This cannot be undone.

noLibraries.heading: Niente da vedere qui
noLibraries.messagePrefix: You can't see what you don't have

message.wait: Una volta create le librerie, verranno visualizzate qui

serverSOS.heading: Server non disponibile

desktop.message:
Si è verificato un errore di rete, sembra che il tuo server Stump non è al momento disponibile. Assicurati che sia in funzione e accessibile da questo dispositivo.
Se l'URL del tuo server è cambiato, puoi aggiornarlo utilizzando il modulo sottostante

web.message: Si è verificato un errore di rete, sembra che il tuo server Stump non è al momento disponibile. Assicurati che sia in funzione e accessibile da questo dispositivo

serverSOS.reconnected: Riconnesso al server! Redirezione in corso...

serverStatusOverlay.heading: Il server non è connesso
message: per cambiare l'URL del tuo server

common.unimplemented: Questa funzionalità non è stata ancora implementata! Riprova più tardi
common.limitedFunctionality: Questo non è stato ancora implementato completamente e mancano alcune funzionalità. Riprova più tardi

ACCESS_KOREADER_SYNC.description: Allows the user to access the KoReader sync integration

ACCESS_SMART_LIST.label: Smart Lists
ACCESS_SMART_LIST.description: Allows the user to access smart list features, including creating and managing smart lists

CREATE_BOOK_CLUB.description: Allows the user to create new book clubs

DELETE_NOTIFIER.label: Delete notifiers
DELETE_NOTIFIER.description: Allows the user to delete notification systems

DOWNLOAD_FILE.description: Allows the user to download files from the server

EDIT_LIBRARY.label: Edit libraries
EDIT_LIBRARY.description: Allows the user to modify existing libraries

EMAILER_CREATE.label: Create emailer
EMAILER_CREATE.description: Allows the user to create email configuration

EMAILER_MANAGE.description: Allows the user to manage email configuration and settings

EMAILER_READ.label: Read emailer
EMAILER_READ.description: Allows the user to view email configuration

EMAIL_ARBITRARY_SEND.label: Send arbitrary emails
EMAIL_ARBITRARY_SEND.description: Allows the user to send custom emails to any address

EMAIL_SEND.description: Allows the user to send emails through the system

FILE_EXPLORER.label: File explorer
FILE_EXPLORER.description: Allows the user to browse and explore the server filesystem

MANAGE_LIBRARY.label: Manage libraries
MANAGE_LIBRARY.description: Allows the user to manage library settings and configuration

MANAGE_NOTIFIER.label: Manage notifiers
MANAGE_NOTIFIER.description: Allows the user to manage notification system settings

READ_USERS.description: Allows the user to view user account information

SCAN_LIBRARY.label: Scan libraries
SCAN_LIBRARY.description: Allows the user to trigger library scans to discover new content

UPLOAD_FILE.label: Upload files

MANAGE_JOBS.label: Manage jobs
MANAGE_JOBS.description: Allows the user to manage any queued jobs

EDIT_METADATA.label: Edit metadata
EDIT_METADATA.description: Allows the user to edit metadata for books and series

WRITE_BACK_METADATA.label: Write back metadata
WRITE_BACK_METADATA.description: Allows the user to write metadata changes back to the source files

EDIT_THUMBNAILS.label: Edit thumbnails
